prestazioni: Engine: AJ-V6 (AJ30) 3.0L V6 naturally aspirated (2967cc, 231hp stock) – Full forged internals upgrade with Manley forged pistons (9.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings to handle 500+ hp reliably. Pair with a custom-compiled ECU reflash via Syvecs S6Plus standalone ECU (Jaguar X-Type-specific CAN bus integration) for aggressive ignition timing and fuel maps optimized for 100-octane race fuel.

Forced Induction: Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.82 A/R, 62mm compressor inducer) with custom Precision Turbo & Engine 46mm wastegate and TiAL MV-R 44mm blow-off valve. Custom front-mount intercooler (Bell Intercoolers X-Type-specific core, 600hp-rated) with 3.5" silicone charge pipes (Vibrant Performance) and dual Bosch 044 fuel pumps feeding ID1000x injectors (Injector Dynamics).

Drivetrain & Handling: Quaife ATB helical LSD (Jaguar X-Type-specific fitment) with upgraded half-shafts (GKN Driveline heavy-duty CV joints). Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (X-Type-specific valving, 30-way adjustable damping) with Eibach Pro-Kit springs (25mm drop) and polybushings (SuperPro 62mm front control arm bushings). Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (355mm rotors, X-Type-specific brackets) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel lines.
estetica: Aero: Seibon Carbon fiber widebody kit (X-Type Sport-specific, 30mm extended rear fenders) with custom front splitter (Rocket Bunny-inspired, 3D-printed ABS with carbon weave overlay) and adjustable rear diffuser (Perrin Performance, 3-piece carbon fiber). Rear wing: APR Performance GTC-300 (30" span, 7" chord, X-Type-specific mounts).

Wheels & Stance: Work Emotion CR Kiwami (18x9.5 +30 front, 18x10.5 +35 rear) with Nitto NT05R tires (255/40/18 front, 285/35/18 rear). Custom wheel spacers (H&R 15mm hubcentric, 5x108 PCD) for flush fitment. Full de-chrome with gloss black vinyl wrap (3M 2080 series) and satin black powder-coated OEM grille (Jaguar X-Type Sport mesh).

Interior & Lighting: Recaro Sportster CS seats (X-Type-specific rails) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses. Custom roll cage (Custom Cages UK, 6-point bolt-in, T45 steel) with suede-wrapped MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, quick-release hub). Full LED conversion (Lux H8/H11/H16 bulbs) with Morimoto XB LED fog lights and sequential tail lights (VLand X-Type-specific housing).
